title: Desire
description: A mod that focuses on building and simple gameplay tweaks to expand the classic experience to the max!!
body:
![Page Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e40ae9690aac4e56291f4e5d4ea067de65799826.png)

# What is Desire? It's a mod that tries to add "what Minecraft is missing." Focusing mainly on blocks and new materials, intends to make the most of each resource by trying to give it a new life. At the moment it will limit to adding new versions of existing blocks but it has the intention in the future to bring original materials, crafting tweaks and new mechanics!! ![space](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/632785915cd6f48d457ce8d8b7b1e58cd29f33c0.png) ## Features **Highlights:** - Placeable Rocks - Expanded Blockset for Stone, Granite, Diorite, Andesite, Mud, and More. - Flintstone (Gravel Sandstone) - Complete Set for Calcite - New Type of Dripstone - Rough Concrete - Copper Pillars - Terracotta Mosaics - Armadillo Scute Shingless
All blocks ![Mod Tab](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/034add96e83f2cd3189e244bce20a070a3b4b558.png)
![space](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/632785915cd6f48d457ce8d8b7b1e58cd29f33c0.png) ## Compatibility - **[Bountiful Fares](https://modrinth.com/mod/bountiful-fares)** - **[Nature's Spirit](https://modrinth.com/mod/natures-spirit)** - **[Jaden's Nether Expansion](https://modrinth.com/mod/jadens-nether-expansion)** ## Dependencies

![space](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/632785915cd6f48d457ce8d8b7b1e58cd29f33c0.png) ## FAQ - **Q: Will there be a port to X version?** - A: I hope that the mod continues to be updated in the future to keep the Mod up to date with the latest Minecraft version, but I don't think there will be any backport pre 1.20 - **Q: Desire will continue to be updated?** - A: YES, but But thanks to the current "drop" system that Mojang is using, my plans have been delayed quite a bit, although there are plans for multiple content updates, I don't know how long they might take, so I just ask for your patience, thank you. - **Q: Can i use Desire in a Modpack or Server?** - A: Absolutely!! - **Q: The mod is compatible with X mod?** - A: The list of compat-mods will expand in the future depending on people's reception. - **Q: Will there be a version for Forge/NeoForge?** - A: Hopefully in the future, but it does WORKS with Sinytra Connector!! - **Q: Will there be a Bedrock version? / Can I port this Mod to Bedrock?** - A: No, don't expect anything Bedrock-related, and please do not port it yourself.
Credits and Special thanks!! - **Main coder:** [@Hecco](https://linktr.ee/thehecco) Thanks for making this possible <3 - Thanks to [@ArBeeeet](https://x.com/ArBeeeet) & [@Dedemianmia](https://x.com/dedemianmia) for Testing the Mod! - Thanks to [@ThatJadenXgamer](https://x.com/ThatJadenXgamer) for helping me set up the Mod page.
